title: verify-reproduction input spec
description:
Input spec for ``verify-reproduction``.

``tolerance`` absent (``None``) — or present with every bound absent —
means an EXACT comparison.

original_run_id.description: Run id of the ORIGINAL run being reproduced.
original_run_id.title: Original Run Id

repro_run_id.description: Run id of the reproduction run. Its sidecar's `reproduces` field MUST name original_run_id, or the verb refuses (SpecInvalid).
repro_run_id.title: Repro Run Id

tolerance.description: Caller-owned tolerance; None (or all-absent) → exact comparison.

KeyTolerance.description:
Per-metric-key tolerance override.

Both bounds optional; an absent bound is simply not applied. When BOTH
are absent the key is compared EXACTLY (``==``) — same as supplying no
tolerance at all.

abs_tol.description: Absolute tolerance: |orig - repro| <= abs_tol counts as a match.
abs_tol.title: Abs Tol

rel_tol.description: Relative tolerance: |orig - repro| / max(|orig|, |repro|) <= rel_tol counts as a match.
rel_tol.title: Rel Tol

KeyTolerance.title: per-key reproduction tolerance

ReproTolerance.description:
Caller-owned tolerance for the reproduction comparison.

All fields optional. When every field is absent (and ``per_key`` empty)
the comparison is EXACT — numeric metrics must be bit-equal. A default
bound applies to every numeric key that has no ``per_key`` override; a
``per_key`` entry fully replaces the default for that key.

default_abs_tol.description: Absolute tolerance applied to every numeric key lacking a per_key override.
default_abs_tol.title: Default Abs Tol

default_rel_tol.description: Relative tolerance applied to every numeric key lacking a per_key override.
default_rel_tol.title: Default Rel Tol

per_key.description: Per-metric-key tolerance overrides, keyed by the (flattened) metric key.
per_key.title: Per Key

ReproTolerance.title: reproduction tolerance spec
